Company Description


We Are Bosch.

At Bosch, we shape the future by inventing high-quality technologies and services that spark
enthusiasm and enrich people’s lives. Our areas of activity are every bit as diverse as our outstanding
Bosch teams around the world. Their creativity is the key to innovation through connected living,
mobility, or industry.

Let’s grow together, enjoy more, and inspire each other. Work #LikeABosch

Reinvent yourself: At Bosch, you will evolve.
Discover new directions: At Bosch, you will find your place.
Balance your life: At Bosch, your job matches your lifestyle.
Celebrate success: At Bosch, we celebrate you.
Be yourself: At Bosch, we value values.
Shape tomorrow: At Bosch, you change lives.

Job Description


What you will do

You will be responsible for developing automated tools/templates to improve the efficiency and quality of plant operations in a timely manner. You will perform in-depth analysis of problem statements and provide solutions through an automated approach. You will identify areas of improvement with engineering, quality, and operations leadership.

How you will do it

Work with Engineering team members from various domains to understand the automation requirements.

Ensure the user-friendly graphics of the generated tools/templates.

Prepare logs for each tool for future correction and development purposes.

Prepare standard operating procedures for all developed reports.

Prepare guidelines for the usage of the developed tool.

Get prompt feedback from users and resolve all reported bugs.

Identify all manual efforts and automate them to improve productivity.

Work on Power BI to create visually impactful dashboards and reports.

Design Power Automate workflows to extract Power BI data to shared locations and automate email notifications.

Use VBA scripting to schedule tasks and automate repetitive processes efficiently.

Develop solutions for integrating data across MS Excel, SharePoint, and other platforms.

Provide training sessions for end-users to maximize tool usability.

Optimize Power Query processes for faster execution times and enhanced tool performance.

Explore opportunities for integrating AI-based solutions like ChatGPT API (or similar technologies) for advanced data analysis within Excel environments.

Develop tools and provide training for team members

Opportunity to leverage data science knowledge in solving issues

Support engineering team members to complete their continuous improvement ideas in case automation is needed

Collaborate with automation community/experts/forums to get the solution for complex situations without disclosing organizational confidential data


Qualifications


Required

Bachelor’s / Master’s degree in Computer Science
Min 3+ years of experience in Power BI tool development
Experience in paginated reports (Report Builder)
Proficiency in SQL queries, report generation, and Power Query
Should be able to handle large data/datasets
Excellent skills in MS Excel, VBA development, MS PowerPoint, and SharePoint

Additional Information
